allow: PowerShell(@\("yarn", "pnpm", "bun", "winget", "scoop", "choco"\) | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-Command $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "$_ : $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "$_ : not found" } })

PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command node\).Source } catch { 'node not found' }; try { \(Get-Command npm\).Source } catch { 'npm not found' }; try { \(Get-Command pnpm\).Source } catch { 'pnpm not found' }; try { \(Get-Command yarn\).Source } catch { 'yarn not found' }; try { \(Get-Command bun\).Source } catch { 'bun not found' })
PowerShell(try { $v = & node -v; "node $v" } catch { "node NOT FOUND" }; try { $v = & npm -v; "npm $v" } catch { "npm NOT FOUND" })
